title: Tool Update
description: Tool Update is a practical mod focused on tool enhancement and progression. By accumulating usage experience, players can unlock upgrade paths for tool enchantments, granting their tools more powerful capabilities.
body:
Key Features:

  Proficiency System: Tools gain proficiency through use

  Enchantment Upgrades: Spend proficiency to enhance existing enchantments

  Visual Interface: Convenient upgrade selection and status display

  Spectacular Effects: Particle effects and sound feedback during upgrades

How to Use:

  1.Use tools normally to accumulate proficiency

  2.Use the hotkey(H) to open the upgrade interface

  3.Select the enchantment you wish to upgrade

  4.Spend proficiency to complete the upgrade

Compatibility:

  Supports all vanilla tool types

  Compatible with most vanilla enchantments

  Configurable blacklist system

Version: 0.7
